release_notes: 2.13.4 added an archive flag to part types. On multi-PC (cloud) setups the underlying column only appears after the **main (primary) PC** has been updated and opened, so a secondary PC that updated first could crash on launch with `no such column: archived`. The app now tolerates the column being absent — it starts normally and simply enables archiving automatically once the main PC's update has synced across. No data was affected.
